claim_status: no-claim planning inventory only; no profile implementation, no real-profile migration, no sync support, no credential storage support, no user-data handling readiness, no data-loss safety claim, no production profile-format claim, and no implementation claim

record_types.name: Profile Record
record_types.purpose: Define the profile identity root, local policy scope, storage root reference, supported schema window, privacy boundary, and failure boundary without carrying secrets.
record_types.versioning: Every profile record carries schema_version, minimum_reader_version, writer_build_id, profile_epoch, and migration_generation.
record_types.authority_boundary: Profile records describe authority scope but do not grant credential, cookie, extension, Plug-in, update, sync, or agent authority.
privacy_rules: diagnostics use IDs and reason codes

record_types.name: Space Record
record_types.purpose: Define a user-visible workspace view over tabs, layouts, saved references, resource policy, optional agent context, privacy boundary, and failure boundary inside one profile.
record_types.versioning: Every Space record carries schema_version, space_epoch, parent_profile_epoch, and layout_generation.
record_types.authority_boundary: Space records organize work but are not authority boundaries; profile, origin, permission, agent, and storage services revalidate every action.
privacy_rules: agent context is referenced by scoped handle
export policy omits secrets by default
shared snapshots require explicit redaction policy

record_types.name: Session Record
record_types.purpose: Define restart and restore state, privacy boundary, and failure boundary for windows, tabs, lifecycle states, navigation entries, and protected work without replaying unsafe page effects.
record_types.versioning: Every session record carries schema_version, session_epoch, writer_build_id, checkpoint_sequence, and previous_checkpoint_hash.
record_types.authority_boundary: Session records can request restore but cannot grant navigation, credential, permission, file, device, agent, or extension authority.
privacy_rules: form values are excluded unless a specific protected-work record permits local-only retention
agent pending actions are not auto-replayed

record_types.name: Snapshot Record
record_types.purpose: Define bounded recovery, privacy boundary, and failure boundary for Time Machine-like references to user-visible browser work without retaining secrets or executing historical state.
record_types.versioning: Every snapshot record carries schema_version, snapshot_epoch, source_session_epoch, retention_class, and content_manifest_hash.
record_types.authority_boundary: Snapshot records are recovery references and never authority to restore credentials, permissions, service-worker effects, downloads, or agent actions.
privacy_rules: credential and cookie values are excluded
sensitive page text requires explicit local-only policy

record_types.name: Migration Record
record_types.purpose: Define migration intent, source and target schema versions, checkpoints, rollback limits, privacy boundary, failure boundary, and evidence for safe format transitions.
record_types.versioning: Every migration record carries schema_version, migration_id, source_schema_version, target_schema_version, step_sequence, and resume_token.
record_types.authority_boundary: Migration records describe transformation state but carry no authority to open real user data, accept downgrades, delete data, or bypass owner-reviewed privacy policy.
privacy_rules: real user profile fixtures are prohibited before owner review
credential material remains with the credential broker
logs use record IDs and hashes
exported evidence excludes raw user data

behavior_matrix.name: Disk Full
behavior_matrix.purpose: Prove writes reserve space, stop before partial durable state becomes authoritative, and preserve old checkpoints.
behavior_matrix.safe_failure: Reject the operation, preserve the previous readable state, and surface a recovery action.

behavior_matrix.name: Power Loss
behavior_matrix.purpose: Prove interrupted writes and migrations resume or roll back without accepting torn state.
behavior_matrix.safe_failure: Quarantine incomplete state and reopen the last verified checkpoint or a repair flow.

behavior_matrix.name: Corruption
behavior_matrix.purpose: Prove malformed, truncated, duplicated, reordered, and hash-mismatched records are treated as hostile input.
behavior_matrix.safe_failure: Quarantine the affected record set without deleting unrelated profile data.

behavior_matrix.name: Downgrade
behavior_matrix.purpose: Prove older binaries cannot open newer formats and corrupt them silently.
behavior_matrix.safe_failure: Block write access and offer supported export or upgrade guidance.

behavior_matrix.name: Export
behavior_matrix.purpose: Prove exports preserve user intent while excluding secrets, private-session state, and unsupported sync metadata.
behavior_matrix.safe_failure: Abort export and show which record class or redaction rule blocked completion.

behavior_matrix.name: Deletion
behavior_matrix.purpose: Prove deletion and clearing target the requested profile, Space, site, or record class only.
behavior_matrix.safe_failure: Stop before deletion or retain a rollback path where policy permits.

behavior_matrix.name: Private Session
behavior_matrix.purpose: Prove private-session records use separate ephemeral roots and are not persisted in normal profile stores.
behavior_matrix.safe_failure: Fail closed by discarding private-session state rather than writing it to a normal profile store.

behavior_matrix.name: Crash Recovery
behavior_matrix.purpose: Prove browser or process crash recovery distinguishes reloadable tabs from protected unsaved work.
behavior_matrix.safe_failure: Fail safely by opening a recovery surface that explains lost, protected, and reload-only state separately.

behavior_matrix.name: Protected Work
behavior_matrix.purpose: Prove forms, downloads, uploads, and pending consequential agent actions are never silently discarded or replayed.
behavior_matrix.safe_failure: Block destructive lifecycle changes until the user or owning service resolves the protected state.

behavior_matrix.name: Privacy
behavior_matrix.purpose: Prove routine records, traces, exports, and diagnostics exclude secrets and sensitive payloads by default.
behavior_matrix.safe_failure: Do not emit the diagnostic, export, or snapshot when redaction cannot be proven.

behavior_matrix.name: Data Loss
behavior_matrix.purpose: Prove operations identify possible data loss before executing and record what evidence would establish safety.
behavior_matrix.safe_failure: Stop the operation, keep existing data unchanged, and require owner-reviewed recovery evidence before retrying destructive flows.
